creator: matusita@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
Committers,

kiri> Updated the port ja-skkserv-9.6(japanese/skkserv). 

actually he is not a maintainer of this port, but I've already
approved this patch (he contacted me before this send-pr was issued
and I told to him to do send-pr instead of me).

Current japanese/skkserv was broken in startup script (it's my
mistake, sorry). I wanna fix this until the next release is coming to us...

-- -
Makoto `MAR' MATSUSHITA
